text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! Turn, and... That's it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Club Member A
text_block_list.text: Wow! That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Club Member B
text_block_list.text: Sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Sakura Chiyono O is teaching a group of
young Umamusume to dance after receiving a
request from an Umamusume club.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The steps and choreography are important, but if
you remember just one thing, it's that you should
dance with feeling!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You have to pour your gratitude for the people
who support you into your dancing, okay?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whew! I worked up a good sweat!
choice_data_list: Great job. How were the kids?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! Everyone worked hard and learned
quickly! Dance really is best paired with a smile!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: They're all such good kids...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Sorry, I just got caught up in some
memories.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I actually used to attend this club myself—the
Victory Club.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Victory Club helps train Umamusume for
racing from a very young age.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're well-known for their cheerful
atmosphere... and, for some reason, having a lot
of members with "Sakura" in their names.
choice_data_list: So that's why they asked for your help...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yep! This sure brings me back... Just like them, I
was taught how to dance by an older Umamusume
too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She was so pretty and cool, and watching her
made my heart race. That's when I decided to do
my best at dancing too...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted my dancing to make everyone smile like
hers did.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Was my lesson today as good as hers?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Look at me, getting all gloomy. Hehe...
choice_data_list:
So this is how passion gets passed down through
the years...

So this is how passion gets passed down through
the years...
Take a look at the children around you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Look at me, getting all gloomy. Hehe...
choice_data_list:
So this is how passion gets passed down through
the years...

So this is how passion gets passed down through
the years...
Take a look at the children around you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I wonder if she felt the same way I do now.
choice_data_list:
Maybe the children here today will be the
teachers for the children of tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I get it now! Dancing is... No, it's not just
dancing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Racing, singing, and everything else too! No matter how much times change, these things still exist! They're our connection to the past and future!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Club Member A
text_block_list.text: Miss Chiyono O! Teach us more dances, please!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch with a warm feeling in my chest as history
unfolds and repeats, and dance is passed down
from one generation to the next.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
You're not doing it right! Miss Chiyono O's
dancing was way more exciting!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
Then, um... Okay! Let's try spinning faster like she
did!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I can't believe it. I'm actually doing it. I'm
sparkling just like my teacher did back then.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right, here I go! I have to dazzle them even
more!
